title: Computer Organization and Architecture
textbook_refs: Patterson & Hennessy: Computer Organization and Design (RISC-V Ed)
Hamacher: Computer Organization and Embedded Systems

topics.title: Boolean Functions and Minimization: Karnaugh Maps and Quine-McCluskey
Combinational Circuit Design: Adders, Subtractors, Comparators, and Muxes
Sequential Circuit Design: Flip-Flops, Registers, and Counters
Number Representations: Twos Complement, IEEE 754 Floating Point
Integer Arithmetic Unit: Carry-Lookahead Adders and Booth Multiplier
Floating-Point Arithmetic: IEEE 754 Operations and Rounding Modes
RISC vs CISC: Architecture Philosophy and Real-World Trade-offs
RISC-V ISA: Instruction Formats, Registers, and Base Integer Instructions
x86 and x86-64 ISA: Key Instructions and Programming Model
Addressing Modes: Immediate, Register, Direct, Indirect, and Indexed
Single-Cycle Datapath Design: ALU, Register File, and Control
Control Unit Design: Hardwired and Microprogrammed Control
Pipeline Hazards: Data, Control, and Structural Hazards and Solutions
Out-of-Order Execution: Tomasulo Algorithm and Reorder Buffer
Branch Prediction: Static, Dynamic, and Tournament Predictors
Superscalar and VLIW Processors: Instruction-Level Parallelism
Cache Design: Direct-Mapped, Set-Associative, and Fully-Associative
Cache Replacement Policies: LRU, FIFO, Clock, and Belady's Optimal
Cache Coherence Protocols: MSI, MESI, and Directory-Based Coherence
Virtual Memory Hardware: TLB, Page Tables, and Multi-Level Paging
DRAM and SDRAM: Internal Organization, Timing, and DDR Standards
Storage Systems: HDD Mechanics, SSD Flash, and NVMe Interface
I/O Interfaces and Buses: PCI Express, USB, SATA, and I2C
Interrupts and DMA: Programmed I/O, Interrupt-Driven, and DMA Transfer
Multicore and SMP Architecture: Memory Consistency and Synchronization
GPU Architecture: SIMD, Warps, Memory Hierarchy, and CUDA Model
Embedded Systems Architecture: Microcontrollers, Real-Time Constraints
Power and Performance: Dynamic Voltage Scaling, Amdahl's Law, Roofline Model
Memory Consistency Models: Sequential Consistency, TSO, and RVWMO
Placement Guide: Computer Organization Interview Questions and GATE Preparation
